CREATE TABLE vec1 (id INT, values LIST<FLOAT>);
CREATE TABLE vec2 (id INT, values LIST<FLOAT>);
SELECT v1.id, v1.values <=> v2.values AS distance FROM vec1 v1 JOIN vec2 v2 ON v1.id = v2.id;
SELECT id, values <=> (SELECT values FROM vec2 WHERE id = 1) AS distance FROM vec1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (SELECT values FROM vec1 WHERE id = 2) <=> (SELECT values FROM vec2 WHERE id = 2) AS distance;
SELECT id, values, (values <=> [1, 2, 3]) AS distance FROM vec1 WHERE distance < 2.0;
CREATE TABLE temp_results AS SELECT v1.id, v1.values <=> v2.values AS distance FROM vec1 v1, vec2 v2;
SELECT AVG(distance) FROM (SELECT v1.id, v1.values <=> v2.values AS distance FROM vec1 v1 CROSS JOIN vec2 v2) AS distances;
